calc_crc16.name: calc_crc16
calc_crc16.canonical_plate:
Computes a CRC-16 checksum over a byte buffer using the CCITT /
XMODEM variant of the algorithm.
Polynomial: 0x1021
Initial CRC value: 0xFFFF
No input or output reflection, no final XOR.
Processes input one byte at a time, shifting 8 bits of state per byte.
